name: Shrivasa
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Vata and Kapha.
mainMedicinalUses: Used for rheumatism and chronic joint conditions.
Effective for respiratory issues like bronchitis.
Used as a base for many Ayurvedic ointments.
plantProfile: Himalayan Pine tree providing medicinal resin.
safetyProfile: May cause skin irritation if applied directly.
